svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 10 nodes and 9 edges. flowing left to right. Key nodes: Workflow docs, workflow-format, Workflow graph.. Key relationships: Workflow docs points to workflow-format; workflow-format points to Workflow graph; Core policy points to CONTRACT.. Layout spans 1973 by 618 units with 10 rendered node boxes and 9 routed edge paths.

g.title: Core policy points to Engine orchestration
Runtime adapter points to Engine orchestration
WASM adapter points to Engine orchestration
